sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. The patient reports taking Crestor daily.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 118/72 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Neurologic exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness, potentially related to his diabetes and current medications.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Refer the patient for cardiac rehab. A referral to a dietitian will be placed. The patient's insulin regimen will be reviewed. Order a hemoglobin a1c.
